REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., AND HSBC BANK N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO AUGUST 25, 2016. MOVING PARTY IS ORDER TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT AND REPLY. (THE COURT IS IN RECEIPT OF TWO COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS). OPPOSING PARTY IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH SFLR 2.7B AND PROVIDE COURTESY COPY OF OPPOSITION. COURTESY COPIES MUST BE DELIVERED TO DEPARTMENT 501 NO LATE THAN JULY 29, 2016 WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-26-2016 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-25-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Linda Sue Catron (415-999-1933) Plaintiff/Moving party in Pro Per.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., HSBC BANK N.A., DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, dismissal filed on August 23, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint, Answer Defendants Affirmative Defenses
Off Calendar Aug-24-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff, Linda S. Catron the moving party.
No appearance by the opposing party.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF LINDA CATRON'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint, Answer Defendants Affirmative Defenses is DENIED. Motion fails to comply with CRC 3.1324. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. No proof of service re: all parties in this action. Matter is off calendar. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Reported. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-21-2016 Continued To Aug-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE LLC., MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC., AND HSBC BANK N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Continued to August 25, 2016. Moving party is order to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the operative complaint and reply. (The Court is in receipt of two courtesy copies of the moving papers). Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copy of opposition. Courtesy copies must be delivered to Department 501 no late than July 29, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
